content: I spent around 20 dollars on morimens today and it was absolutely worth it
This is the second time that I received this ad today. Should I give in and install it? They're lowkey being pretty persistent about it
targetted ads for a reason , download that bitch.
Sounds like a Plan, Pollux's Husband
I’d rather enter the after life than to download this… calling it slop seems like a severe understatement
Lowkey just weird asf even for an ad
I've often read similarly weird shit
So stuff like that is kinda right up my alley
Hence, why I was so willing to download the app
is there a place where i report bugs in this server?
Are you seriously having a mango as a snack?
I sleep through the day for now
Where is rain when i need him
Sleep in day, active at night
Must i traverse the shadow realm to find him
I think it is good,i dont cook lmao (scrambled eggs)
cant go wrong with some eggs
idk if you have access to it, but if you like meat then sucuk with scrambled eggs are a great fit
IM FUCKING FREE FROM WUTHERING WAVES ECHO REROLL
holy hell I should've uninstalled it long ago
It felt like a chore playing it every day
It just takes too much disc space
Now im gonna go install mecharashi back
Drip always tempting us with food
How do you have half a terabyte
Tama, whats your fav dish, or at least top five

Sucuk is a garlicky beef sausage
It originates from Turkey and you have to peel the skin off before using it
I have a quarter of s terabyte spaces over 5 discs, but in js one?
My brother in christ, I'm poor
Why are yu so knowledgeable tama? <:thinking1:1356068128936820929>
I like a lot of dishes but I would boil it down to these 3 categories
Looks like they eat a lot
I used to take my time reading up stuff about different cultures and their dishes
It is good enough for myself
Drip, your also the same person sending your snacks pic everyday in general chat and tempting people with food yk
I request sample food of tama <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
The first time i only sent some bbq ribs
Ye ill be stealing your food from now
The eggs and mango are 2nd and 3rd
Jokes on you im worth nothing
Wai when did you wake up
Ohly ribs and rice with beans
I have breakfast at 11 am on a holiday
Wai when do you go to bed?
What do you do st night then?
you do not sleep st might
Or if i wake up early
If i dont resonf im playing OW2
Yippee, now i can legally consume your food <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
If i respond ks that i ided in game
Ah, then lock ingame i suppose, and ill finish my series here
you let the birds wander around the house?
They go to their cage and hit em
The budgies even if i open the cage they wont go out
Although i let em out of their cage
no, i just dont go outside
i see, just hard to see
They be like every 20 minutes *CHRIP CHIRP CHIRP*
I could pick u up with one hand
I ain't american how many centimeters that is
How u want me to know
oh we're around the same height then
Uprobably older than me tho lmao
god bless my mid height chungus life
wait how old are u cuz I'm 17
Its the same age as me
i just accepted the fact i won't grow any taller <:H_immerse:1426122347643146250>
grow taller than me and then we'll talk
i dare you to grow taller than me
I will be taller than u
This game is so cute, npc also react according to your emote
Oh ok, you bhery thin for that height
I dunno what that translates to but oke
One of my friends is 5'1 or 4'11 lmao
Prob my height when i was 13
That is what i said, your smoller
My family is not genetically tall
Im the second tallest in my family rn
If your family is tall then you'll prob grow tall
But i doubt you be taller than me
Here around  my age is the average height is 5'2 to 5'6
Your main growth spurt prob didnt hit
But i dunno much about female hormones
Hey, we dont discriminate by height
Hah,i have surpassed my 18 year old friend
You might surpass me height if you dude <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
Whats the avg height for your family
O, ye you could be taller than me
God dayum, thats the height of the tallest family member in meh family
Usually i heard the youngest have it easier
Age advantage, they would never expect the youngest to have a plan
Thats just average height isnt it?
I folded under all the Expedition 33 memes and got the game. Only to find there's no mini map or yellow paint. I'm fucked <:Clown:1400771541423226971>
Gonna hug the left wall through the whole game and hope I win
So how is the game so far?
1st one looks like the giga chad meme
Aurora has been there for 5min writing <:cry3:1356082134447558748>
Inb4 bible text long of messages

Good but lacks QoL, you can easily miss shit. No quest log, no fast travel. 
It put all its effort into immersion / sound effect and music. Like there's this character which is barefoot for whatever reason and when she walks you can hear the sound of feet slapping on the ground. It changes depending on what the ground is, like hard stone, sand, carpet etc.
I can see how it got game of the year
Really can't escape feet allegations aurora
Cuz who dafuk puts that much effort into smt like that

embeds.title: Avicii vs. One Direction vs. Ke$ha - What Makes Levels Die Young
embeds.description:
https://www.facebook.com/smadaleinad
https://twitter.com/smadaleinad
It appears that making a Die Young mashup is all the craze these days (I was going to make one anyway haha)... And I've been meaning to mashup Levels and WMYB.. So this came to be. Please rate, comment, subscribe, and enjoy! :) ---
